jobs.title: Applied Research Engineer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Applied Research Engineer</strong></p><p>Labelbox is the AI-data-development platform pioneered around the labelled-training-data-pipeline data model & the AI-data-development segment.</p>

jobs.content: <p>Lead Labelbox's Alignerr Services function across the Catalog / Annotate / Model / Boost platform.</p>
